77346479.title: Wuthering Heights (2026 film)
77346479.extract:
Wuthering Heights (stylized with quotation marks) is a 2026 period romantic drama film produced, written and directed by Emerald Fennell, loosely based on the 1847 novel by Emily Brontë. Margot Robbie and Jacob Elordi respectively star as Catherine Earnshaw and Heathcliff, alongside Hong Chau, Shazad Latif, Alison Oliver, Martin Clunes, and Ewan Mitchell in supporting roles. 
Wuthering Heights premiered at the Grauman's Chinese Theatre in Los Angeles, California on January 28, 2026, and was released in the United Kingdom and United States by Warner Bros. Pictures on February 13. The film received mixed reviews from critics and has grossed $114.1 million worldwide.
